suggestions.current_slice: Focused changelog/docs monitor via CLI, reusing Site Change Monitor

risks.description: Dev teams may not pay for this as a product -- many solve it with ad-hoc scripts or ignore it entirely.
Some changelog pages are JS-rendered (React SPAs) and return empty HTML with plain fetch. Requires manual URL verification per target.
Risk of blending into generic website monitoring in the market's eyes -- requires sharp messaging.

suggestions.summary: CLI-verktyg som bevakar externa changelogs och docs för dev-team.
